summary: Created Eshkol-local swarm ledger for v1.3-evolve milestone, mirroring QGTL .swarm/ structure. Decisions locked (stack-copying call/cc, (the-environment) as compile-time form, ESHKOL_VALUE_HANDLE runtime lifecycle, mesh node assignment by platform). Risks recorded.

Dispatched 11 v1.3 tasks via tsotchke-chan. Found that --backend claude is a sandboxed advisory variant without filesystem access; failed claude tasks re-dispatched via codex. ESH-0001/0002/0003/0006/0010/0011/0012/0013/0014/0016 active on codex; ESH-0004 still running on claude.
AD input2 coverage completed for conv2d, batchnorm, layernorm, and scaled-dot-attention; neural_xor loss gate verified under 0.001; focused local and mesh smokes passed at 77885c79.
